popularStory.headline: Marjorie Bruce or Marjorie de Brus (1296 – 2 March 1316)
popularStory.description:
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marjorie_Bruce

Marjorie Bruce or Marjorie de Brus (1296 – 2 March 1316) was the eldest daughter of Robert the Bruce, King of Scots by his first wife, Isabella of Mar, a …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland於1296年12月12日出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾卡德洛斯時，她的父親Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots22歲，母親Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick19歲。她於1315年與Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她在英國蘇格蘭被列為countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus。她去世於1316年3月2日在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比享年19歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland于1296年12月12日出生在苏格兰登巴頓史爾卡德洛斯时，她的父亲Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots22岁，母亲Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick19岁。她于1315年与Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland在苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她在英国苏格兰被列为countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus。她去世于1316年3月2日在英国苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比享年19岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Majorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland was born on 12 December 1296, in Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, her father, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, was 22 and her mother, Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick, was 19. She married Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland in 1315, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. Her occupation is listed as countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus in Scotland, United Kingdom. She died on 2 March 1316, in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 19, and was buried in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland est née le 12 décembre 1296, à Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland en 1315, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. La profession de sa indiquée est countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 2 mars 1316, à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 19 ans, et a été enterrée à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland am 12. Dezember 1296 in Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots 22 und ihre Mutter Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick 19. Sie hat 1315 in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. ihr Beruf ist als countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Sie starb am 2. März 1316 im Alter von 19 Jahren in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland è nata il il 12 dicembre 1296 nel Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland nel 1315, nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. La sua occupazione è indicata come countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 2 marzo 1316, nel Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 19 anni, e fu sepolta a Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotlandが1296年12月12日にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアカードロスで生まれた時，父Robert I the Bruce, King of Scotsは22歳，母Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrickは19歳であった。1315年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドでWalter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。イギリススコットランドでの職業はcountess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angusと記録されている。彼女は1316年3月2日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーで19歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland(이)가 1296년 12월 12일 스컷랜드 던바토실르 카드로스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1315년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus이었다. 그녀는 1316년 3월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에서 19세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.12 December 1296–2 March 1316: 12 de dezembro de 1296–2 de março de 1316
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland nasceu em 12 de dezembro de 1296, em Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland em 1315, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Sua profissão aparece como countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 2 de março de 1316, em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 19 anos, e foi sepultada em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland родилась 12 декабря 1296 г. в местности кардросс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland в 1315 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.  Она работала по профессии countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Она умерла 2 марта 1316 г. в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 19 лет и была похоронена в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

sm.from 1306 to 1314: mai le 1306 e o'o I le 1314

es.12 December 1296–2 March 1316: 12 de diciembre de 1296–2 de marzo de 1316
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Majorie Bruce Princess of Scotland nació el 12 de diciembre de 1296, en Cardross, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert I the Bruce, King of Scots, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabella of Mar Countess of Carrick, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Walter Stewart 6th High Steward of Scotland en 1315, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Su ocupación registrada era countess of monteith, duchess of albany, countess of angus en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1316, en Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 19 años, y fue sepultada en Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
